meaning: n.划线器,描绘标记的用具
examples: EF Talk Scriber combines a text editor and an audio file player, designed to work like a dictation transcribing machine.
In the machining process, often need a bench worker use scriber mark lines on the work piece to determine the processing location and inspection.
The bent shaft is mounted on the roller for positioning the roller brackets of the laying-out table and scriber pictures circle on the two ends of the bent shaft.
